hero.title: Master your subscriptions with
hero.description: SubFlow brings all your monthly spending together in one place. Track subscriptions, spot savings opportunities, and stay fully in control.

benefits.title: Clear subscription tracking
benefits.description: Bring all recurring subscriptions together so you always know exactly what you pay every month.

benefits.title: Better budget visibility
benefits.description: Spot price increases, monitor recurring expenses, and stay ahead of upcoming charges.

benefits.title: Your data stays local
benefits.description: Your information stays stored locally on your device so you keep control over your privacy.

benefits.title: Savings you can actually find
benefits.description: Quickly identify unused subscriptions, duplicates, and concrete ways to optimize your spending.

faqs.question: How can I manage my monthly subscriptions efficiently?
faqs.answer: SubFlow brings your subscriptions into one interface so you can track recurring expenses, view due dates, and keep a clear picture of your budget.

faqs.question: How do I track subscription spending over time?
faqs.answer: The app helps you visualize monthly spending trends, analyze categories, and understand how recurring costs affect your budget.

faqs.question: Is SubFlow a free app?
faqs.answer: Yes, SubFlow offers a free experience, with advanced features available through SubFlow+ for deeper analysis and optimization.

faqs.question: Which devices support SubFlow?
faqs.answer: SubFlow is available on iPhone, iPad, and Android, with an experience designed for simple everyday subscription management.

faqs.question: How does SubFlow help me save money on subscriptions?
faqs.answer: SubFlow detects unused services, duplicates, and price increases so you can cut unnecessary spending and save up to 30% on your recurring expenses.

slides.title: See your spending clearly
slides.description: Get a clear overview of your subscriptions. SubFlow brings all your monthly expenses together in one place.

slides.title: Analyze your habits
slides.description: Use intuitive charts to understand your spending. Spot trends and identify optimization opportunities.

slides.title: Track your budget
slides.description: Keep an eye on how your spending evolves month after month. SubFlow helps you stay aligned with your financial goals.

slides.title: Manage your categories
slides.description: Organize subscriptions by category for a clearer view of where your money goes.

slides.title: Detailed insights
slides.description: See every subscription in detail with all the important information at a glance.

slides.title: Intuitive interface
slides.description: An app designed to feel simple, clear, and pleasant to use every day.

seo.title: SubFlow - Subscription Manager | Track & Save | Free App
seo.description: SubFlow: the free app to manage your subscriptions. Track monthly expenses, visualize savings, and optimize your budget. Download now on iOS and Android.
seo.keywords: subscription manager, subscription tracker, expense control, monthly savings, subscription app, SubFlow, budget tracker, monthly budget, recurring expenses, budget optimization
